nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 鸠鸽科
nodes.summary: 鸠鸽科（Columbidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: Santa Cruz ground dove
nodes.summary: Santa Cruz ground dove（Alopecoenas sanctaecrucis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Santa Cruz ground dove。

nodes.name: Santa Cruz ground dove
nodes.summary: The Santa Cruz ground dove (Pampusana sanctaecrucis) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is found in the southern Solomon Islands and Vanuatu. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. This species was formerly in the genus Alopecoenas Sharpe, 1899, but the name of the genus was changed in 2019 to Pampusana Bonaparte, 1855 as this name has priority. References External links BirdLife Species Factsheet.

nodes.name: 紫珠鸠属
nodes.summary: 紫珠鸠属（Alopecoenas）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联7种鸟类，如Wetar ground dove、Shy ground dove、Santa Cruz ground dove等7种鸟类。

nodes.name: 瓦努阿图
nodes.summary: 瓦努阿图是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联22种鸟类，包括扇尾杜鹃、白喉林鸽、Santa Cruz ground dove等22种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。
